lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: I knew you would save us! Bless you, my child!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! Just stay indoors while those zombies are still prowling around.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: May Saradomin's light shine upon you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell him to save it for when I manage to defeat those zombies!

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Saradomin smile upon you! You've saved us all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All in a day's work, brother.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Your name will forever be listed amongst the virtuous!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll remember that the next time I go drinking...
